name: example-huashu-golden-circle
title: Golden Circle Diagram
description: Sinek/TED-school diagrammatic minimalism decks: warm-white paper, ink, and exactly one gold accent (#E8860C) with its tints; a single geometric master figure — nested concentric WHY/HOW/WHAT circles built from pure border-radius divs — carries every page of the deck through fill, highlight, grey, and outline modes; uppercase Jost labels embedded in the figure, Manrope display headlines, inside-out arrows, zero charts and zero images. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design design-styles.md diagrammatic-minimalism (单图母图概念图解), generated from the spec into a full multi-section deck.

description_i18n.en: Sinek/TED-school diagrammatic minimalism decks: warm-white paper, ink, and exactly one gold accent (#E8860C) with its tints; a single geometric master figure — nested concentric WHY/HOW/WHAT circles built from pure border-radius divs — carries every page of the deck through fill, highlight, grey, and outline modes; uppercase Jost labels embedded in the figure, Manrope display headlines, inside-out arrows, zero charts and zero images. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design design-styles.md diagrammatic-minimalism (单图母图概念图解), generated from the spec into a full multi-section deck.
description_i18n.zh-CN: Sinek/TED 流派的「单图母图概念图解」幻灯片：极简暖白纸底 + 墨黑 + 唯一金色强调 #E8860C（含同色系浅阶），一个嵌套同心圆 WHY/HOW/WHAT 几何母图（纯 border-radius div 绘制）以填充/高亮/灰化/描边四种模式贯穿整套 deck；大写 Jost 标签嵌入图形、Manrope 标题、由内向外箭头，零图表、零图片素材。基于花叔 huashu-design design-styles.md 中性派「单图母图概念图解」规格生成完整多章节 deck。

query.en: Create a Golden Circle Diagram {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Diagrammatic Minimalism system (based on huashu-design design-styles.md 单图母图概念图解 — Sinek/TED lineage): a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport; warm-white paper #FAFAF7 framed only by 1px hairline header/footer strips (uppercase 13px Jost labels with a gold `/` separator — no solid chrome bars); the locked token set with exactly ONE accent hue #E8860C plus its tints #F2BA6B/#FAE5C3, warm-grey neutrals #E8E4D9/#F2EFE7 for de-emphasis, and a dark #161512 page only as the closing bookend; fonts Jost (uppercase tracked labels embedded in the figure) + Manrope (800-weight headlines, body) via the existing Google Fonts @import, with PingFang SC fallback for Chinese. The deck is carried by ONE geometric master figure — the nested concentric-circle `.gc` component (pure border-radius divs at inset 0/16%/33%, labels absolutely positioned inside each band, sized via the --gc custom property) — reused in its locked modes: full golden fill (cover/master page), mode-how / mode-what band highlights, mode-grey counter-example, mode-outline stroked rings on the dark closing page, plus the solid accent disc, faint watermark rings, mini three-circle SVG glyphs, and inside-out SVG arrows. Choose layouts from the locked enumeration: cover (headline + master figure) / contents (hairline rows with glyph markers) / master-diagram page with inward-out arrow and ring-by-ring notes / one page per ring (WHY statement + solid disc, HOW three-pillar columns, WHAT 2×2 evidence cards) / big-number page (300px Manrope-800 numeral with accent glyph and watermark rings) / two-column inside-out vs outside-in comparison (grey circle vs gold circle with directional arrows) / quote page with offset watermark rings / dark outline closing. No second accent hue, no second font family, no photos, no icon fonts, no emoji, no charts — every visual is the circle or a derivative of it; concepts must map onto the figure's bands instead of bullet walls. Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying example.html and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, .gc component, hairline chrome, and navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, counter pill) intact. Rename the rings if the user's framework is not WHY/HOW/WHAT (e.g. 信念/路径/产品, core/loop/surface) but keep exactly three bands; use the user's real framework and numbers, never lorem ipsum; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes; replace all fictional 同心/TONGXIN demo content.
query.zh-CN: 用「黄金圆环图解」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：1920×1080 固定画布、暖白纸底 #FAFAF7、上下仅 1px 细线信息条、唯一金色强调 #E8860C 及其同色浅阶、Jost 大写标签 + Manrope 标题；整套 deck 由唯一的嵌套同心圆几何母图（.gc 组件，纯 border-radius div）以填充/环高亮/灰化对照/描边四种锁定模式贯穿，版式从封面/目录/母图页/WHY 页/HOW 三栏/WHAT 卡片/巨数页/由内向外对比页/引语页/暗色描边结尾枚举中取用。禁止第二强调色、第二字体、照片、图表与 emoji —— 所有概念都映射到圆环的环带上。从 example.html 复制出单文件、只换内容，保留 token、.gc 组件、细线信息条和导航脚本；圆环三层可按用户框架改名但必须保持三层；用真实内容、替换全部「同心 TONGXIN」演示文案。完整规格以英文版为准（follow the en query above）。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：我们的产品增长方法论

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 高管会 / 全员大会 / 行业演讲
